title: FallCraft
description: My first ever mod based on "Fallout 4" video game.
body:
This mod adds content from Fallout 4 video game.
What's this mod?
-----------------------
This mod is based on Fallout 4 video game. All of guns and misc things are 3D, with custom sounds and crafts.

Features:
------------
- Fatman - shoots mini nukes that deal colossal damage (Ammo: tnt).
- 10mm Pistol - 9 dmg pistol (Ammo: 10mm Ammo).
- Stimpaks - Heal to full health mobs (LBM) or event/target entity (RBM).
- Fussion Core (IN DEVELOPMENT).
- PipBoy (IN DEVELOPMENT).
- NukaCola - Basic drink.
- Nuka Cap - Currency (UNDONE).
- Medicine Box block.
- 10mm Ammo.

REQUIRES  [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) mod
-------------------------

This mod is new, but in the future it will add:
----------------------

- Mobs.
- More weapons.
- Structures.
- Biomes.
- NPCs.
- Custom trades.
- Villages based on Fallout 4.
- Bunkers.
- Armor.
- Power armor.
- Custom workbenches.
- Item upgrade system.
- Player S.P.E.C.I.A.L. system.
- PipBoy mechanics.
- Building blocks.
- Food & drinks.
- Custom sounds on basicaly everything.
- DLCs content.
- JEI support.
- HP and OD huds (maybe in resource pack, but im not sure).
- Misc sings like RAD-X or meds.
- Custom paintings.
- Custom music discs.
- Challenges and tasks from NPCs.
- Bosses.
- New dimensions.
- Custom effects.
- Keybinds.
- Other mods support.
- Curius API.

Can I use this mod in my modpack?
------------------------------------
Go ahead! Just make ensure you abide by the following conditions:

You cannot claim that you own the entirety, or any parts, of this mod
You must cite the author(s) of this mod
You must provide a link back to this page


Feel free to ask questions on our [Official FallCraft Discord server!](https://discord.gg/3CCcQJeUqp)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
